item.title: CISA’s Ransomware Guidance Is Reminder to Include AD in Recovery Plan - Semperis
item.description: Any ransomware recovery plan needs to include regular file backups and encrypted data with offline copies, as the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) recently reminded as part of the organization’s campaign to drive awareness of its ransomware guidance and resources. The guidance includes best practices and checklists to help companies formulate their cyberattack response plans. And while backups are fundamental to any recovery plan, those backups won’t save an organization if the malicious attack...

item.title: Semperis Identity Attack Watch: February 2021 - Semperis
item.description: Active Directory cyberattacks are on the upswing, putting pressure on AD, identity, and security teams to monitor the constantly shifting AD-focused threat landscape.

item.title: Semperis Sweeps Three Categories at the 2021 Global InfoSec Awards - Semperis
item.description: Semperis has been named a winner in the 2021 Global InfoSec Awards from Cyber Defense Magazine across three categories.

item.title: Semperis Directory Services Protector Wins 2021 Fortress Cyber Security Award - Semperis
item.description: Semperis was named a winner in the 2021 Fortress Cyber Security Awards for Directory Services Protector (DSP) by the Business Intelligence Group. Read to learn more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: June 2021 - Semperis
item.description: Roundup of the latest identity-related cyberattacks, including ransomware attacks on Colonial Pipeline, JBS, FujiFilm, and more. Read "Identity Attack Watch: June 2021" to learn more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: July 2021 - Semperis
item.description: Semperis Research Team highlights recent Active Directory cyberattacks including details about the MeteorExpress, and more.

item.title: Detecting and Mitigating the PetitPotam Attack on Windows Domains - Semperis
item.description: Learn how to detect and mitigate PetitPotam, a combination of several attacks that require only network access with potential to gain full Domain Admin permissions.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: August 2021 - Semperis
item.description: ProxyShell, PetitPotam, Hive, and LockBit 2.0 cyberattacks are on the rise. Read "Identity Attack Watch: August 2021" to learn more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: September 2021 - Semperis
item.description: This roundup of identity-related cyberattacks includes a new U.S. government advisory about the escalation in Conti group attacks and surges in activity from the LockBit and BlackMatter ransomware groups.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: October 2021 - Semperis
item.description: Identity related cyberattacks, Microsoft’s warnings about delegating privileges, and more in the Semperis Identity Attack Watch series.

item.title: HIP Conference 2021: Practical AD Security Fixes for Today and Identity Protection Trends for Tomorrow - Semperis
item.description: 2021 Hybrid Identity Protection Conference, practical tips for securing Active Directory. Click "Practical AD Security Fixes" for more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: November 2021 - Semperis
item.description: Explore a new Windows zero-day vulnerability that can give malicious actors admin privileges, and more. Click to learn more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: December 2021 - Semperis
item.description: This month's cyberattack roundup includes two Active Directory vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to take over Windows domains, the Log4j vulnerability, and new activity from the Cuba ransomware group. Read our recent post "Identity Attack Watch: December 2021" to learn more.

item.title: EMA Report: Unknown Vulnerabilities Emerge as Top Active Directory Security Concern - Semperis
item.description: Unknown vulnerabilities are the top Active Directory security concern of IT and security practitioners from a new report from EMA.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: January 2022 - Semperis
item.description: Exploits of Azure Active Directory cyberattacks lacking MFA enforcement, and more as part of Semperis Identity Attack Watch. Click to learn.

item.title: Semperis Chief Technologist Guido Grillenmeier Speaks at 18th German IT Security Congress - Semperis
item.description: The 18th German IT Security Congress is a high-profile event over two days with rigorously selected speakers from government,

item.title: SPN-jacking: An Edge Case in WriteSPN Abuse - Semperis
item.description: Attackers can manipulate SPN, without obtaining SeEnableDelegation privileges. Read our post on SPN-jacking to learn more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: February 2022 - Semperis
item.description: Semperis researchers summarize data wiper malware used in cyberattacks that took out Ukrainian sites, and more. Read our recent post.

item.title: Defending Hybrid Identity Environments Against Cyberattacks - Semperis
item.description: Security experts conclude that current identity and access management (IAM) practices aren’t up to the task of securing hybrid ecosystems.

item.title: Securing Active Directory Is First Step in Aligning with New UK Financial Conduct Authority Guidelines - Semperis
item.description: To comply with UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) regulations for operational resilience, secure Active Directory from cyberattacks. Read our recent post "Securing Active Directory Is First Step in Aligning with New UK Financial Conduct Authority Guidelines" to learn more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: March 2022 - Semperis
item.description: Recent identity-related cyberattacks include the HermeticWiper attacks on Ukrainian organizations, and more can be read about in our recent post.

item.title: New Azure AD Security Indicators Help Protect Hybrid Identity Environments - Semperis
item.description: Here’s a rundown of security indicators in Semperis DSP and why they’re important to your Azure AD security posture. Click to learn more!

item.title: Revisiting the Colonial Pipeline Cyberattack, One Year Later - Semperis
item.description: What have we learned since the Colonial Pipeline cyberattack? Read "Revisiting the Colonial Pipeline Cyberattack, One Year Later" to find out.

item.title: Hybrid Identity Protection: IDPro Founder Ian Glazer - Semperis
item.description: Catch IDPro founder on the latest episode of HIP! Learn more in "Hybrid Identity Protection: IDPro Founder Ian Glazer".

item.title: What It Means to be a Mission-Driven Company - Semperis
item.description: Does being "mission-driven matter? It matters to us. Learn more in "What It Means to be a Mission-Driven Company".

item.title: Achieving Operational Resilience with Simon Hodgkinson - Semperis
item.description: How does disaster recovery contribute to operational resilience? Read "Achieving Operational Resilience with Simon Hodgkinson" to learn more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: June 2022 - Semperis
item.description: Semperis Research Team highlights increased activity by Conti, BlackCat attackers targeting Exchange servers, and more in "Identity Attack Watch: June 2022"

item.title: Hybrid Identity Protection with Dr. Nestori Synnimaa - Semperis
item.description: Sean Deuby's talk on hybrid identity protection with AADInternals creator Dr. Nestori Synnimaa can be heard here.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: July 2022 - Semperis
item.description: LockBit's ransomware attacks on small towns, Black Basta's hit on materials manufacturer Knauf, and more in the July Identity Attack Watch from Semperis.

item.title: Securing Hybrid Identity - Semperis
item.description: Securing hybrid identity can be a challenge. At Semperis our most recent post intends to offer useful guidance to your organization.

item.title: SIEM and SOAR—and Identity Security - Semperis
item.description: How adept are SIEM and SOAR at protecting AD? Understanding potential threats—especially related to Tier 0 identity assets like Active Directory—is important.

item.title: SMTP Matching Abuse in Azure AD - Semperis
item.description: Attackers can use SMTP matching to hijack Azure AD. Read our recent post "SMTP Matching Abuse in Azure AD" to learn more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: August 2022 - Semperis
item.description: Active Directory cyberattacks from Bumblebee Loader, and more are covered in the Semper Identity Attack Watch Series. Click to read more.

item.title: Digital Identity Management with Julie Smith - Semperis
item.description: How are organizations addressing identity management and security challenges? Read "Digital Identity Management with Julie Smith" to find out.

item.title: Active Directory Protection for Healthcare Organizations - Semperis
item.description: Managing Active Directory protection in healthcare organizations? Where do you start? Prevention starts with the basics. Read more.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: September 2022 - Semperis
item.description: Identity-related cyberattack roundup includes attacks by Hive, BlackCat, and BlooDy gangs. Read our recent post to learn more.

item.title: Missouri School District Finds and Fixes Active Directory Security Gaps - Semperis
item.description: Learn how a School District improved their Active Directory security. Get insights on simple security fixes and monitoring AD for threats.

item.title: A Community for Identity Professionals - Semperis
item.description: The concept of "identity professionals" is fairly new. Read "A Community for Identity Professionals" to learn more.

item.title: Why DC Snapshots Are No Substitute for Active Directory Backups - Semperis
item.description: Protect your Active Directory from data loss with proper backups. Learn why relying on DC snapshots alone is not enough.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: October 2022 - Semperis
item.description: Microsoft’s warnings about the novel Prestige ransomware campaign, more Hive activity, and new Exchange Server zero-day attacks.

item.title: Identity Threat Response with Brian Desmond - Semperis
item.description: ITDR is gaining importance as cyberattackers continue to find new ways into environments. Hear what Brian Desmond said about his experience helping organizations.

item.title: Construction Firm Strengthens its ITDR Foundation with Purple Knight - Semperis
item.description: The construction industry is not immune to cyberattacks. Learn how a construction company strengthened its Active Directory with an ITDR solution.

item.title: Duns 100 Ranks Semperis in Top 15 to Work For - Semperis
item.description: We're thrilled to be rated a Duns 100 top place to work. Learn more in "Duns 100 Ranks Semperis in Top 15 to Work For".

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: November 2022 - Semperis
item.description: Stay ahead of the game with our Attack Watch highlighting Ukraine attacks linked to the Russian Sandworm group, new LockBit group attacks, and more.

item.title: Operational Resilience: More than Disaster Recovery - Semperis
item.description: Get expert insights from Simon Hodgkinson, former CISO at bp, on the importance of Active Directory security and recovery for operational resilience.

item.title: Why Recovering Active Directory from a Cyberattack Is an Essential Component of ITDR - Semperis
item.description: Protect your organization with an ITDR plan that includes recovering Active Directory in case of a cyberattack. Gain expert guidance on AD recovery.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: December 2022 - Semperis
item.description: New LockBit attacks in California and Portugal, a Hive attack on a Louisiana hospital, and a BlackCat attack. Read December's Attack Watch.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: AD Security News, January 2023 - Semperis
item.description: Cyberattacks by ransomware gangs Vice Society, LockBit, and Sandworm hit Ukraine, schools. Get AD security news in Attack Watch.

item.title: 3 Steps to Protect AD from Wiperware - Semperis
item.description: Worried about wiperware? Here are three ways to secure Active Directory and your organization from this type of cyber threat.

item.title: Identity Attack Watch: AD Security News, February 2023 - Semperis
item.description: Improve AD security by learning about new attack methods, and more targeting Microsoft Exchange ProxyShell. Click to learn more.
